title: Cell-ELONA
author: Guillermo Fernández Rodríguez
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7umhnu6

steps.title: Inoculate a single colony of E
steps.instruction: Inoculate a single colony of E.Coli DH5α from LB agar plate in 10 mL of LB. Use a sterile pipette tip, selecting a single colony from LB agar plate. The liquid culture is incubated overnight 37 °C

steps.title: Spin at 4000 rpm for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Spin at 4000 rpm for 00:05:00 . Discard the supernatant, collect pellet and re-suspend in 10 mL of NaHCO 3 -Na 2 CO 3, 50mM, pH 9,6. Mix by inverting the tube.

steps.title: Spin at 4000 rpm for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Spin at 4000 rpm for 00:05:00 . Discard the supernatant, collect pellet and re-suspend in 8 mL of NaHCO 3 -Na 2 CO 3, 50mM, pH 9,6. Mix by inverting the tube.

steps.title: Read the absorbance (600nm)
steps.instruction: Read the absorbance (600nm). Dilute the sample with NaHCO 3 -Na 2 CO 3, 50mM, pH 9,6, and adjust the absorbance to 1.

steps.title: Dilute the sample 1:4 with NaHCO...
steps.instruction: Dilute the sample 1:4 with NaHCO 3 -Na 2 CO 3, 50mM, pH 9,6 in a eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of the bacterial...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of the bacterial sample into Nunc MaxiSorp 96-well plate and Coating buffer for the negative control. Incubate overnight at 4 °C with agitation (260rpm).

steps.title: Remove Coating buffer. CAUTION
steps.instruction: Remove Coating buffer. CAUTION: Be careful to do not touch the well and remove the bacteria.

steps.title: Wash 3x 200 µL with PBS 1x-Tween 0,1%
steps.instruction: Wash 3x 200 µL with PBS 1x-Tween 0,1%. Remove the drops after the last wash. CAUTION: Be careful to do not touch the well and remove the bacteria.

steps.title: Block the plate with 200 µL...
steps.instruction: Block the plate with 200 µL PBS 1x BSA 5% for 01:00:00 (260 rpm).

steps.title: Structure digoxigenin-labelled aptamers (denatured for 10...
steps.instruction: Structure digoxigenin-labelled aptamers (denatured for 10 min at 95°C and then cooled for 10 min on ice), previously prepared in different concetrations.

steps.title: Wash 3x 200 µL with PBS 1x tween 0,1%
steps.instruction: Wash 3x 200 µL with PBS 1x tween 0,1%. Remove the drops after the last wash. CAUTION: Be careful to do not touch the well and remove the bacteria.

steps.title: Add 100 µL /well of the structured aptamers
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL /well of the structured aptamers. Incubated for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: Wash 3x 200 µL with PBS 1x tween 0,1%
steps.instruction: Wash 3x 200 µL with PBS 1x tween 0,1%. Remove the drops after the last wash.

steps.title: Add anti-body antidigoxigenin ( 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Add anti-body antidigoxigenin ( 100 µL /well) preparing 1:1000 dilution in Aptamer buffer-BSA 0,2%. Incubate at room temperature for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: Wash 3 x 200 µL with PBS 1x Tween 0,1%
steps.instruction: Wash 3 x 200 µL with PBS 1x Tween 0,1%.

steps.title: Add 100 µL/wall of ABTS solution
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL/wall of ABTS solution. Read the absorbance (405 nm) every 00:10:00 for 01:00:00 . ADVICE: We recomend you to buy the ABTS than comes diluted and with the oxygene peroxide.
